meaning: n.天(门)冬氨酰苯丙氨酸甲酯(一种约比蔗糖甜200倍的甜味剂)
examples: Sucrose was replaced with maltitol and aspartame, and sugar-free glazed waxberry is developed with the method of vacuuming penetration.
Aspartame first came on the market 25 years ago.
Aspartame: Imitation sweetener in diet foods and beverages. Associated with brain cancer.
You have to click on the Wikipedia link to find that aspartame is the sweetener.
The safety of sweeteners, like aspartame, has been extensively tested by scientists and is assured by regulators.
